title: Crispy Savory German Collards Stir-fry
description: A savory and crispy dish featuring German collards, kneaded gently to avoid burning, suitable for midnight cravings with a Jain-friendly twist.
instructions: Wash and roughly tear German Collards into bite-sized pieces.
Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add garlic and onion slices; sauté until fragrant but not browned, about 2 minutes.
Add collards to the pan and toss gently with tongs or spatula for 1-2 minutes until slightly wilted.
Optional: Add jalepeño slices if using, tossing them in with the collards. Stir-fry for another minute to distribute the flavors evenly.
Remove from heat immediately after adding collards. Let cool briefly before kneading gently for about a minute until crispy.
